title: dryopteris beddomei
intro: Dryopteris beddomei, also known as Beddome's wood fern, is a species of fern native to the Western Ghats mountain range in India. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Dryopteris beddomei include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and help in wound healing. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, including colds, coughs, and skin infections.
